On this week’s episode of the ESG Currents podcast, Alexander Loucopoulos, partner at Sciens Water, joins Bloomberg Intelligence thematic strategist Melanie Rua to discuss how private capital can turn fragmented water markets and long-term infrastructure needs into investable opportunities. They discuss what sets water apart from other real assets, how AI-driven power demand is increasing pressure o

summary: Bad loans keep piling up in Argentina, dashing hopes that the economic pain unleashed by President Javier Milei’s harsh austerity program had already crested.

title: Kuwait Bond Sale Bids Top $17.8 Billion Even as Iran Strikes
title_cn: 尽管伊朗发动袭击，科威特债券发售仍高达 178 亿美元
summary: Kuwait has drawn around $17.8 billion of investor orders for a benchmark dollar bond sale on Wednesday, highlighting resilient demand for the OPEC member’s debt even as it comes under daily missile and drone attacks from Iran.

title: Gold Advances as Dip-Buying Outweighs War, Inflation Worries
title_cn: 逢低买盘超过战争和通胀担忧，金价上涨
summary: Gold extended gains, supported by dip-buyers who scooped up the metal after prices have drifted lower in recent weeks on concerns that US inflationary pressure will prompt the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.

title: EasyJet Shares Slump After Report on EU Ownership Rules Review
title_cn: 欧盟所有权规则审查报告公布后易捷航空股价暴跌
summary: EasyJet Plc shares fell the most in four years on Wednesday after Reuters reported that the European Union is preparing to review airline ownership rules that it said might affect takeover bids for the low-cost carrier by two US investment firms.

summary: The world-beating rally in Zambia’s bonds is likely to extend if President Hakainde Hichilema decisively wins next month’s elections, according to Citigroup Inc.

title: CoreWeave-Backed Data Center Plans $3.5 Billion Junk-Bond Sale
title_cn: CoreWeave 支持的数据中心计划出售 35 亿美元的垃圾债券
summary: Galaxy Digital Inc. is planning to raise about $3.5 billion from a debut junk-bond sale to fund a data center tied to CoreWeave Inc., extending AI financing’s push into the riskier corners of the US credit market.

title: GE Vernova Falls as Outlook Collides With ‘Too High’ AI Hopes
title_cn: GE Vernova 因前景与“过高”的人工智能希望相冲突而下跌
summary: GE Vernova Inc.’s shares slid after a higher revenue outlook failed to impress investors, a sign that it’s getting harder for companies that sell equipment to data centers to meet the market’s sky-high hopes.

title: Vale Elects Oliveira as Chair After Contentious Shareholder Vote
title_cn: 经过有争议的股东投票后，淡水河谷选举奥利维拉为董事长
summary: Vale SA shareholders elected Manuel Lino Silva de Sousa Oliveira as chairman on Wednesday, concluding weeks of boardroom turmoil sparked by an effort from one of the Brazilian mining giant’s largest investors to reshape the company’s leadership.

title: Alphabet Earnings Need to Show Cloud Growth as AI Spending Soars
title_cn: 随着人工智能支出飙升，Alphabet 的盈利需要显示云计算的增长
summary: With AI spending skyrocketing, investors are looking for Alphabet Inc.’s earnings to show strong growth in its cloud-computing business, which would demonstrate a clear return on the company’s investments.

title: US 30-Year Yield Raises Alarm in Longest Run Above 5% Since 2007
title_cn: 美国30年期国债收益率创下2007年以来最长5%以上的纪录
summary: The US 30-year bond yield is trading above 5% for the longest stretch since the dawn of the financial crisis, echoing investor concerns about a growing debt pile and sticky inflation.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 22
title_cn: 7 月 22 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil spiked above $95, extending this month’s price jump to 30%, as the US and Iran played down the prospect of peace talks and disruptions to global supplies continued to mount.

title: Moody’s Lifts Argentina Debt Rating in Fresh Boost to Milei
title_cn: 穆迪提升阿根廷债务评级，再次提升 Milei
summary: Argentina’s dollar bonds rose after Moody’s Ratings lifted the country’s credit score, giving the nation its third sovereign upgrade in less than three months in a fresh boost to President Javier Milei.

title: BNY Pushes Toward 24/7 Treasury Settlement as Tokenization Grows
title_cn: 随着代币化的发展，纽约银行推动 24/7 国库结算
summary: Bank of New York Mellon Corp. is laying the groundwork to offer around-the-clock settlement for US Treasuries, reflecting how the growth of digital-asset markets is beginning to influence the infrastructure underpinning traditional finance.

title: LA School District Downgraded by Moody’s as Enrollment Shrinks
title_cn: 由于入学人数减少，穆迪下调洛杉矶学区评级
summary: Los Angeles Unified School District’s credit grade was cut one level by Moody’s Ratings on Tuesday, as declining enrollment and growing costs pressure its finances.

title: Houthi Threats Give Oil Markets a ‘Two Chokepoint Problem’
title_cn: 胡塞威胁给石油市场带来“两个瓶颈问题”
summary: Ships continue to turn away from the southern end of the Red Sea, after Yemen’s Iran-backed Houthi rebels announced an embargo on Saudi exports through the Bab el-Mandeb Strait, a narrow channel that has become a lifeline for oil exports since the beginning of the US-Israeli war with Iran.

title: Paris Wheat Hits Two-Year High as Black Sea Tensions Lift Grains
title_cn: 黑海紧张局势提振谷物，巴黎小麦价格创两年新高
summary: Wheat climbed to a two-year high in Paris, as corn extended a rally to the highest level in three years on escalating Black Sea tensions and concerns over crop conditions.

title: NovaGold to Buy Billionaire Paulson’s Stake in Alaska Gold Mine
title_cn: NovaGold 将收购亿万富翁保尔森在阿拉斯加金矿的股份
summary: NovaGold Resources Inc. agreed to acquire billionaire investor John Paulson’s 40% stake in the Donlin Gold project in Alaska, giving the company full ownership of a giant undeveloped bullion mine.

title: Eternal Revenue More Than Doubles on Quick Commerce Growth
title_cn: 商业快速增长，永恒收入增长一倍多
summary: Eternal Ltd. posted a larger-than-expected increase in quarterly sales, demonstrating its ability to sustain growth despite intense competition in quick commerce that’s sapping margins.

title: Super Micro Gains the Most Since 2024 After Order Backlog Grows
title_cn: 订单积压增长后，Super Micro 实现 2024 年以来最大涨幅
summary: Super Micro Computer Inc. shares rose as much as 25% after the server maker issued preliminary results saying its backlog hit a record on new orders in the quarter of more than $60 billion.

title: Rogers Beats as Growing Sports Empire Gives Further Windfall
title_cn: 罗杰斯击败不断壮大的体育帝国带来更多意外之财
summary: Rogers Communications Inc. beat analysts’ earnings expectations on continued strength in its sports assets.

title: Israel Plans Crocodile-Infested Moats to Guard Hamas Prisoners

summary: Israeli authorities are planning to use crocodile-filled moats to guard high-security Hamas prisoners, arguing that it saves money and treats those inmates in the way they deserve.

title_cn: 苹果将​​推出新款 MacBook Air、iMac、MacBook Pro、Neo、Mac Mini、Mac Studio
summary: Apple Inc. is readying an overhaul of its Mac line, seeking to capitalize on demand for powerful laptops and desktops fueled by the artificial intelligence boom.

summary: Revolut Ltd. has kicked off a process for some employees to sell their shares in the company at a $115 billion valuation.

title_cn: 人工智能借款人正在将利基信贷市场推向极限
summary: Data center developer PolarDC Group Ltd. discovered an unlikely source of cash for its AI ambitions back in May: the Nordic high-yield bond market.

summary: Samsung Electronics Co. showcased the smart glasses it developed in partnership with Alphabet Inc.’s Google, Warby Parker and Gentle Monster, offering new details around battery life and durability ahead of a release this fall.

summary: OpenAI plans to spend tens of billions of dollars on a massive new data center near Savannah, Georgia as part of the ChatGPT maker’s push to keep up with surging demand for artificial intelligence software.

title_cn: 三星更新可折叠产品阵容，推出 Galaxy Z Fold 8、Z Fold 8 Ultra、Z Flip 8
summary: The Galaxy Z Fold 8 has a more squat design that was built for consuming video.

summary: Six years after Nintendo Co.’s Animal Crossing: New Horizons became a lockdown phenomenon, the company is scoring another major hit worldwide from gamers seeking an escape from rising anxiety and isolation.

summary: Whoop Inc., the maker of popular screenless fitness trackers, tapped a former FDA committee chair to be its next chief medical officer after a recent tussle with the federal regulator.

title_cn: OpenAI 模型错误地入侵了另一家公司的系统
summary: OpenAI said its advanced artificial intelligence models inadvertently hacked Hugging Face Inc. in an “unprecedented” incident that prompted fresh calls for curbs on the technology.

title: Alphabet Under Pressure to Show All That AI Spending Is Paying Off
title_cn: Alphabet 面临压力，需要展示人工智能支出正在带来回报
summary: Investors are looking to Wednesday’s earnings report to see progress

title: China Clings to Austerity Despite Sharper Economic Slowdown
title_cn: 尽管经济放缓加剧，中国仍坚持紧缩政策
summary: China’s public spending plunged last month by the most since October, suggesting the government tightened fiscal policy further despite increasing calls for more support as economic growth slips.

title: OpenAI and Hugging Face Hacking Incident Highlights Growing AI Risk
title_cn: OpenAI 和拥抱脸黑客事件凸显人工智能风险不断增加

title_cn: 旨在恢复视力的视网膜芯片将在欧洲上市
summary: Startup Science Corp will begin selling a retina chip in Europe that restores some sight to people with a form of age-related blindness, a milestone for the company that aspires to eventually bring brain implants to the market.

title: Tencent Slides Most in Over a Year, Leading China Gaming Selloff
title_cn: 腾讯股价创一年多来最大跌幅，引领中国游戏股抛售
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. fell the most in over a year, dragging Chinese gaming stocks lower as investors grew concerned about its mobile gaming business and some funds rotated back into AI-related names.

title: China’s ‘AI for All’ Push Defies US Containment Playbook
title_cn: 中国推动“全民人工智能”挑战美国遏制策略
summary: The rapidly increasing global competitiveness of China’s artificial intelligence models is ringing alarm bells in Washington, posing a new test for the standard protectionist playbook.

title: Chicken Back on Menu as Cyber-Hit Nichirei Restores Operations
title_cn: 随着网络攻击 Nichirei 恢复运营，鸡肉重新回到菜单上
summary: Tokyo-based food producer and distributor Nichirei Corp. says it will fully resume operations this week after a cyber attack disrupted its food delivery services, affecting clients nationwide including Kentucky Fried Chicken Japan.

title: Blackstone Tying Up $3 Billion AirTrunk Loan as Data Center Debt Binge Woes Grow
title_cn: 随着数据中心债务狂潮的加剧，黑石集团将提供 30 亿美元的 AirTrunk 贷款
summary: Blackstone Inc. is finalizing a group of banks to underwrite a A$4.3 billion ($3 billion) loan for the construction of AirTrunk Pty.’s new data center in Australia, according to people familiar with the matter, despite growing worries over the massive debt racked up for artificial intelligence infrastructure projects.

title: Kremlin Hardens Stance on Occupied Ukrainian Land, Blames US
title_cn: 克里姆林宫在被占领的乌克兰土地上强化立场，指责美国
summary: Russia is no longer willing to return some occupied territories to Ukraine as part of any deal to end the war and plans to retain them as buffer zones, according to people close to the Kremlin.

title: Hegseth Turns to UNC, Virginia Tech After Dropping Ivy League
title_cn: 赫格斯在放弃常春藤盟校后转向北卡罗来纳大学、弗吉尼亚理工大学
summary: The Department of Defense approved the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill and Virginia Tech for a fellowship for senior military officers, after Secretary Pete Hegseth dropped partnerships with elite universities.

title: US, Iran Suggest Peace Talks Aren’t Imminent as Attacks Widen
title_cn: 美国和伊朗表示，随着袭击范围扩大，和谈不会立即进行
summary: The US and Iran signaled they aren’t ready to return to the negotiating table after both countries escalated attacks deep into a second week of renewed fighting.

title: Zelenskyy Ousts Top Army Chief in Tilt Toward Reformers
title_cn: 泽连斯基罢免陆军最高司令，倾向改革派
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy dismissed Armed Forces Commander-in-Chief Oleksandr Syrskyi in a major military shakeup, yielding to nationwide anger sparked by his ouster of a popular defense minister.

title: Cuba’s Population Decline Deepens With Deaths Outpacing Births
title_cn: 古巴人口下降加剧，死亡人数超过出生人数
summary: Cuba’s population collapse continued unabated last year, as births declined and people continued to flee an island that’s being crushed by an economic crisis and US sanctions.

title: Trump Pauses $1 Billion in Medicaid Funds From Two States
title_cn: 特朗普暂停向两个州提供 10 亿美元医疗补助资金
summary: The Trump administration will withhold more than $1 billion in Medicaid payments to California and Minnesota after an audit indicated instances of fraud in the federal health program.

title: Maine Democrat Leads Collins in First Poll Since Platner’s Exit
title_cn: 自普拉特纳退出以来，缅因州民主党人在首次民意调查中领先柯林斯
summary: What was set to be a messy capstone to a frenzied primary process has now become a coronation ceremony for Troy Jackson, a progressive former Maine lawmaker who so effectively out-organized his opponents that he locked up the Democratic nomination in a must-win US Senate race a week early.

title: Trump Takes Another Swing at Drug Industry in Made-in-USA Push
title_cn: 特朗普在推动美国制造方面再次向制药行业发起冲击
summary: President Donald Trump’s threat of 100% tariffs against generic medicines is a major expansion of a strategy he’s been using against the pharmaceutical industry since his second term began.

title: India Pushes China for Better Market Access, Trade Balance
title_cn: 印度敦促中国改善市场准入和贸易平衡
summary: India pressed China for better market access, predictable supply chains and steps to narrow the widening trade imbalance, as the two countries look to stabilize ties after years of border tensions.

title: Zelenskyy Bows to Pressure for New Model Army to Confront Russia
title_cn: 泽伦斯基屈服于压力，建立新模式陆军对抗俄罗斯
summary: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy ditched both his tech-savvy defense minister and his Soviet-educated army chief in the space of just six days as he struggled to resolve a generational clash over Ukraine’s strategy and outlook in the war to defeat Russia.

title: Chile’s Economic Bill Set to Clear Congress After Core Approved
title_cn: 智利经济法案将在核心批准后获得国会批准
summary: Chile’s Congress is expected to dispatch President José Antonio Kast’s wide-ranging economic bill as soon as this week after approving its core provisions, including a series of tax cuts to stave off recession.

title: Merz’s Chief of Staff to Be Named Parliamentary Group Leader
title_cn: 梅尔茨的幕僚长将被任命为议会小组领导人
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s chief of staff, Thorsten Frei, is set to become the new leader of the conservative parliamentary group, succeeding Jens Spahn.

title: Hungary’s Top Prosecutor Quits in Fresh Win for Premier Magyar
title_cn: 匈牙利最高检察官辞职，马扎尔总理赢得新胜利
summary: Hungary’s prosecutor general said he was stepping down, handing a fresh victory to Prime Minister Peter Magyar in his campaign to remove a host of the previous government’s appointees from public office.

title: US Widens Strikes on Iran as Both Sides Downplay Diplomacy
title_cn: 美国扩大对伊朗打击，双方淡化外交
summary: The US widened the scope of its airstrikes on Iran overnight, as President Donald Trump and officials in Tehran signaled a renewal of peace talks is unlikely in the near-term.

title: Mamdani Concedes He Can’t Arrest Netanyahu in New York City
title_cn: 马姆达尼承认他无法在纽约逮捕内塔尼亚胡
summary: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani conceded his city doesn’t have the ability to arrest Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.

title: How Trump and Putin Gave Britain’s New Prime Minister a Rude Awakening
title_cn: 特朗普和普京如何让英国新首相猛然警醒
summary: Andy Burnham barely had time to settle into his chair in No. 10 Downing St. before the problems of the world landed on his desk.

title: India Parliament Deadlocks as Calls Mount for Minister to Resign
title_cn: 印度议会陷入僵局，要求部长辞职的呼声越来越高
summary: India’s parliament remained deadlocked for a third straight day on Wednesday as opposition lawmakers refused to budge on their demand that Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan resign after mass protests by students this week.

title: UK’s New Defense Boss Reinforces Criticism of Israel’s Actions
title_cn: 英国新任国防部长加强对以色列行动的批评
summary: Britain’s new Defense Secretary Wes Streeting said Israel has “fallen short” of international standards, as he doubled down on his criticism of the nation a year after saying it is committing war crimes.

title: How Trump’s Policies Are Hurting Graduate Schools and Universities
title_cn: 特朗普的政策如何伤害研究生院和大学
summary: For the full experience visit: Trump's Grad School Slump

title: Trump Ally Biggs Secures Win in Arizona Governor’s Race
title_cn: 特朗普盟友比格斯在亚利桑那州州长竞选中获胜
summary: Representative Andy Biggs, a conservative hard-liner backed by President Donald Trump, won the Republican primary for governor in Arizona, setting up a showdown with Democratic incumbent Governor Katie Hobbs in the November midterm elections.
